description: Plugin-distributed hooks for network-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable network anti-patterns — (1) permissive any/any firewall or ACL rules, (2) cleartext management (telnet/http), (3) a network change document missing a rollback or change window. Inspects config-shaped files (.cfg/.conf/.ios/.nxos/.junos/.txt) and design/change docs (.md). Set NETENG_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
